text_block_list.name: Older Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Good luck to us both today. I'll see you on the
turf!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I'm looking forward to running with
you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Sprinters Stakes. Since it's Nishino
Flower's first time running it, many senior racers
are stopping by to wish her luck.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: She was so big and muscular...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sprinters generally put on a lot of muscle. The
longer their careers, the truer this becomes.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I was just wondering if my size is going to affect
my race results even more than usual...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You told me I'd be able to shine in sprints,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I did my absolute best at summer camp, and I
thought I'd improved. I was determined to win
today, but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Am I really going to be okay? If I fail this, then
I'll...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm emphatic in my reassurance. She's gotten this
far by staying true to herself. That doesn't need
to change.
choice_data_list:
Believe in yourself and how hard you've worked
to get here.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: But...
choice_data_list: If you can't do that, then believe in me!
If you can't do that, then believe in me!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list: You'll become the best sprinter there is!
You'll become the best sprinter there is!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Do you really think so? In that case...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I can do it! Or at least... I want to believe that I
can.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: No! I do believe I can!
choice_data_list: Go out there, and make me smile!
Go out there, and make me smile!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I will!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Flower! You're here!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You may have left me in the dust—or maybe it's
sand? You may have left me in the sand at
summer camp, but today will be different!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Today, I will be the winner!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid I cannot agree with that statement.
After all, I will be the one who embraces the
breeze at the front of the pack.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Last year, I suffered a bitter defeat. This time, I
won't let anyone stand in front of me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...!
That was Trainer's voice...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale... Right.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I-I won't let you... beat me either!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm going to win!
